heading: Regulations
label: 1207 Regulations
notes: Effective DateSection effective , or six months after the promulgation of regulations which would implement its provisions, whichever is later, see , set out as a note under .May 1, 1971section 10 of Pub. L. 92–63section 1201 of this title

children.heading: Operating and technical conditions and characteristics; frequencies, emission, and power of radiotelephone equipment
children.label: a Operating and technical conditions and characteristics; frequencies, emission, and power of radiotelephone equipment
children.text: The Federal Communications Commission shall, after consultation with other cognizant agencies, prescribe regulations necessary to specify operating and technical conditions and characteristics including frequencies, emission, and power of radiotelephone equipment required under this chapter.

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: b Enforcement
children.text: The Secretary shall, subject to the concurrence of the Federal Communications Commission, prescribe regulations for the enforcement of this chapter.
